selections.name: Provance
selections.reason: Brings strong form (1-3-1) into this and drops to a competitive 125lbs. Handles the wet track well and has the tactical speed to overcome the wider draw.

selections.name: Greyzous
selections.reason: Benefits from the light weight bonus at 121lbs. Form is solid with a recent win and a second, making her a major threat despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Flying Destiny
selections.reason: Classy runner with a great barrier draw, but carries a heavy 133lbs which triggers a penalty on the Soft 7 surface. Still a major player on raw ability.

selections.name: Estrondo
selections.reason: Consistent type who won three starts back. Carries 131lbs but has the class to be in the finish if the pace is genuine.

danger_horse.name: Bruckheimer
danger_horse.reason: Emergency gaining a start. Triggers the emergency trap protocol indicating stable confidence. Must be respected.

selections.name: Dominant Darcy
selections.reason: In excellent form with two consecutive wins. Draws perfectly in barrier 5 and looks to have a clear edge over this field.

selections.name: Spiethtacular
selections.reason: Consistent mare with a string of placings. Gets a barrier advantage from gate 4 and will be right in the mix again.

selections.name: Amuseantes
selections.reason: Draws very well in barrier 3 and has shown enough in recent starts to suggest she can feature in the exotics at a price.

selections.name: Abender
selections.reason: Has ability but is penalized by the wide barrier (12) in this sprint distance. Will need luck to cross and feature.

danger_horse.name: Just Precious
danger_horse.reason: Cherry ripe after a good second last start, but the awful draw makes her vulnerable. A threat if she gets luck.

selections.name: Lovey Dovey
selections.reason: In top form with a win and a second in her last two starts. Gets a nice weight drop to 121lbs which is a big advantage at this distance.

selections.name: Prince Levi
selections.reason: Racing in great heart and gets the inside barrier. The 132lbs is a slight concern on the wet track, but his class keeps him right in it.

selections.name: La Rosetta
selections.reason: Emergency runner who won well last start. Gets in light at 119lbs and is a major contender despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Rock Hard Love
selections.reason: Nice effort last time out when second. Steps up in distance but looks up to the task if he can navigate the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Diana's Affair
danger_horse.reason: Finds a nice race here and gets a good draw. Capable of bouncing back to his best form.

selections.name: Boom Shot
selections.reason: Third-up form reads very well. Ready to peak and carries a manageable 122lbs. Looks hard to beat in this lineup.

selections.name: Midnight Drifter
selections.reason: Won well first-up and draws nicely in barrier 3. Steps up in class but has the momentum to be highly competitive.

selections.name: Sultry Siren
selections.reason: Honest mare who is consistently in the finish. Drops to 121lbs and is one of the main contenders.

selections.name: Castillian
selections.reason: Placed four from five when third-up. Ready to show his best and gets a fair draw.

danger_horse.name: I'm Heroic
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who rarely runs a bad race. Wide draw is a slight negative but cannot be ignored for exotics.

selections.name: Wanda Rox
selections.reason: Class dominates weight in this Open Handicap. Top weight but has the highest class rating and a 50% win strike rate. Standout selection.

selections.name: Power Of The Brave
selections.reason: Distance specialist in excellent form. Will be charging late and is the logical main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: King Yoshi
selections.reason: Recent form is very sound with a win and a second. Takes on a better field but is hard to knock.

selections.name: Taltarni Fields
selections.reason: Bounced back to win last start and gets a great inside draw. Will be prominent early.

selections.name: Final Crusade
selections.reason: Pipped on the line on debut and gets the ultimate barrier advantage (1) here. Perfectly placed to go one better.

selections.name: The Autumn Affair
selections.reason: Won well on debut in heavy going. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 and handles the wet track conditions.

selections.name: Better Blitzem
selections.reason: Undefeated colt who has been impressive. The wide barrier (10) is a significant disadvantage at this distance, but raw ability keeps him in the mix.

selections.name: Sniper Boom
selections.reason: Showed improvement last start and gets a good draw. Can feature in the multiples.

danger_horse.name: Another Champers
danger_horse.reason: Won on debut on a rain-affected track. Awful draw makes it tough, but has undeniable talent.

selections.name: Hatchet
selections.reason: In peak form with three consecutive wins. Classy gelding who can overcome the slightly wide draw to keep the picket fence going.

selections.name: Chief In Charge
selections.reason: Also on a three-run winning streak. Drops to 117lbs which is a massive advantage. Looks up to the challenge of this class rise.

selections.name: Battlefield
selections.reason: Genuine gelding with solid recent form. Wide draw is tricky but has the tactical speed to get into a good position.

selections.name: John Rambo
selections.reason: Consistent type who gets in light at 116lbs. Good draw and will be right in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Redford
danger_horse.reason: Back in form with a win last start. Gets a great draw and can win again without surprising.

selections.name: Don'tcha Luv'er
selections.reason: Undefeated filly putting her record on the line. Has looked very sharp and gets a reasonable draw to maintain her perfect record.

selections.name: Fabulantes
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick. Has a horror draw (18) which is a major penalty, but his closing speed is exceptional.

selections.name: Earn To Burn
selections.reason: Testing material based on form, but barrier 21 is a massive hurdle. Included purely on class.

selections.name: Call Da Vinci
selections.reason: Classy type resuming. Gets a great barrier (3) and has performed well fresh previously.

danger_horse.name: Dragonne Rouge
danger_horse.reason: Heavily backed last time and gets the inside barrier. Can bounce back and run a big race.

selections.name: Considered
selections.reason: On a five-run winning streak and handles wet tracks perfectly. Wide draw is the only slight concern, but she is the clear standout.

selections.name: Zoubaby
selections.reason: In great form and gets a perfect barrier (2) advantage. Will be prominent and is the logical danger.

selections.name: Signature Tart
selections.reason: Scored a big win in the wet last start. Draws well and handles the conditions beautifully.

selections.name: Cherry Rose
selections.reason: Consistent mare who draws well. Will find this tougher but can fill the exotics.

selections.name: Capital Asset
selections.reason: Won easily last start and drops to a very light 115lbs. The weight advantage at this distance makes him the top pick despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Felix The Scat
selections.reason: Had excuses last week and gets in very light at 115lbs. Good draw and ready to bounce back.

selections.name: Quothquan
selections.reason: Racing very well this preparation and a win looks imminent. Wide draw is tricky but has the form.

selections.name: Demon Darb
selections.reason: Back in form with a win on a rain-affected track last start. Capable of testing this lineup.

danger_horse.name: Sibaaq
danger_horse.reason: Classy top weight. Will take plenty of beating if he can overcome the 131lbs and wide gate.
